testcase.name: AI Flashcard Generation with Cleanup › @slow can generate ML deck and review cards
testcase.system-out: Created deck with ID: 5d432318-e09c-473c-a867-0e6ce5d7edf8 Cleaned up deck: 5d432318-e09c-473c-a867-0e6ce5d7edf8

testcase.name: Study Session with Cleanup › @slow can complete study session with various grades
testcase.system-out: Created deck for study: 2964a699-bfdd-4ced-ad8b-e2fe4bd44dc7 Reviewed card 1 with grade 4 Reviewed card 2 with grade 2 Reviewed card 3 with grade 5 Study session completed successfully Cleaned up deck: 2964a699-bfdd-4ced-ad8b-e2fe4bd44dc7

testcase.name: Study Session with Cleanup › @slow can navigate between cards and complete session
testcase.system-out: Created math deck: af91a821-24bd-4334-82c0-1e23c2a439f8 Reviewed first card with grade 5 Reviewed second card with grade 4 Study session completed with 2 cards Cleaned up deck: af91a821-24bd-4334-82c0-1e23c2a439f8
